## Entities.ITaskRef interface

Represents a step's reference to a reusable task with parameter values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ITaskRef 
```

</td><td>

Record&lt;string, unknown&gt;


</td><td>

Parameter values to pass to the task template. Keys are variable names, values can be primitives or nested objects. Common values are flat (e.g., temp: 45) Complex data can be dotted (e.g., ingredient: name: 'chocolate', type: 'dark')
